title: Sunipia kipgenii
taxonomy: Sunipia kipgenii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the genus Sunipia, which is a small group of orchids found in the northeastern parts of India. Sunipia kipgenii is further classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Coelogyneae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
